old_values.evidence_locator: AUA Official History (auanet.org/about-us/aua-overview/history-of-the-aua); Crane & Bloom, J Urol 2010;184:1

upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 20620396 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | J Urol 2010 | content_match] Crane GM, Bloom DA. 'Ramon Guiteras: Founder of the American Urological Association, Surgeon, Sportsman and Statesman.' J Urol. 2010 Aug;184(1):447-52.

[Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 17437775 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | J Urol 2007 | content_match] Walsh PC. 'The discovery of the cavernous nerves and development of nerve sparing radical retropubic prostatectomy.' J Urol. 2007 May;177(5):1632-5. Walsh's autobiographical account references his UCLA urology training under Willard E. Goodwin. Shared PMID with Walsh->Brady governance edge.

[Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 11923603 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Ann Surg 2002 | content_match] Marescaux J, et al. 'Transcontinental robot-assisted remote telesurgery: feasibility and potential applications.' Ann Surg. 2002 Apr;235(4):487-92. Marescaux's affiliation listed as IRCAD-EITS, Louis Pasteur University, Strasbourg. Confirms IRCAD as a research institute for MIS/robotic surgery founded and directed by Marescaux. Founding year (1994) documented in institutional sources.

old_values.evidence_locator: Royal College of Surgeons Historical Archives

upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 3545417 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | historical review | content_match] Article identifies Cline among Hunter's direct disciples alongside Abernethy and Astley Cooper. Cline attended Hunter's first lecture course in 1774 and became one of the leading Hunterian surgeons.

[Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 20134311 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Ann Surg 2010 | content_match] Cannon JW, Fischer JE. 'Edward D. Churchill as a combat consultant: lessons for the senior visiting surgeons and today's military medical corps.' Ann Surg. 2010 Mar;251(3):566-72. Documents Churchill's role as Surgical Consultant for the Mediterranean Theater, standardizing whole blood transfusions and delayed primary closure.

old_values.evidence_locator: Walter Reed Army Institute of Research Archives

upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 5762414 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Surgery 1969 | content_match] Rich NM, Hughes CW. 'Vietnam vascular registry: a preliminary report.' Surgery. 1969 Jan;65(1):218-226. The original registry publication by Rich himself. Follow-up PMID 1188624 (Surgery 1975) confirms registry established 1966 at Walter Reed Army Medical Center.

old_values.evidence_locator: Walter Reed Army Institute of Research Archives

upgrades.notes_append: [Phase2 upgraded institutional_archive -> PMID: 5762414 on 2026-03-18] [Verified 2026-03-18 | Surgery 1969 | content_match] Rich NM, Hughes CW. 'Vietnam vascular registry: a preliminary report.' Surgery. 1969 Jan;65(1):218-226. Documents Rich's work within the forward surgical system in Vietnam, the operational descendant of DeBakey's MASH concept. Shared PMID with Rich->Registry institutional_founder edge.

no_upgrade_available.reason: ABU founding documented only on abu.org website and in passing historical references. No PubMed-indexed article specifically documents the AUA's role in founding the ABU.
Walsh's AUA governance (Campbell's editor, society presidencies) documented across many sources but no single PubMed article focuses on his AUA governance role.
ACS-SAGES MIS fellowship accreditation relationship is institutional/programmatic, not documented in a single PubMed article.
Marescaux's SAGES involvement is through IRCAD's training hub integration, not a formal SAGES officer role. No PubMed source documents this relationship.

flagged_for_correction.issue: PMID 29362909 (Yeo et al., Surg Endosc 2018) identifies Gerald J. Marks as the SAGES founder, not Ponsky. Ponsky was SAGES President 1990-1991 and a key early leader, but not the founder.
flagged_for_correction.recommended_action: Reclassify Ponsky edge to governance_leadership. Create new Marks->SAGES society_founder edge citing PMID 29362909.
